name: GD Screensaver
description: Idle menu screensaver that auto-showcases random online rated levels.

enabled.name: Enable Screensaver
enabled.description: Turns GD Screensaver on or off.

idle-timeout-minutes.name: Idle Timeout
idle-timeout-minutes.description: Minutes of menu inactivity before the screensaver starts.

transition-speed.name: Transition Speed
transition-speed.description: Fade duration between levels and when entering or leaving screensaver mode.

featured-epic-only.name: Featured / Epic Only
featured-epic-only.description: Only use featured or epic rated levels.

camera-speed.name: Camera Speed
camera-speed.description: Multiplier for cinematic horizontal camera speed.
